The Industrial Revolution was a period of major industrialization and innovation during the late 1700s and early 1800s. The Industrial Revolution began in Great Britain and quickly spread throughout the world. Summarize this.

Climate change refers to long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns. Human activities have been the main driver of climate change, primarily due to burning fossil fuels like coal, oil, and gas. Summarize this concisely.
All mammals are animals. All dogs are mammals. Is a dog an animal?
If it is raining, the ground is wet. The ground is not wet. Is it raining?
All humans are mortal. Socrates is human. Is Socrates mortal?
Every square is a rectangle. Every rectangle has four sides. Does every square have four sides?
If a number is even, it is divisible by 2. 7 is not divisible by 2. Is 7 even?
If someone lives in Paris, they live in France. Maria lives in Paris. Where does Maria live?
All birds have feathers. Penguins are birds. Do penguins have feathers?
Some fruits are sweet. All apples are fruits. Are all apples sweet?
If a number is greater than 10, it is greater than 5. 3 is not greater than 10. Is 3 greater than 5?
All planets orbit a star. Earth is a planet. Does Earth orbit a star?
